---
title: "BOOLEAN"
generated: true
description: "The Boolean algebra: logical OR combined with logical AND."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.semiring.algebras`](../nitrix-semiring-algebras.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BOOLEAN -->
```python
BOOLEAN: StrictSemiring[Any] = StrictSemiring(monoid=(_OrMonoid()), binary_op=(_AndSemigroup()), identity=False, annihilator=False, name='boolean', matmul_vjp=boolean_matmul_vjp, ell_matmul_vjp=boolean_ell_matmul_vjp)
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:BOOLEAN -->
The Boolean algebra: logical OR combined with logical AND.

The monoid is OR (identity and annihilator `False`) and the binary
operation is AND, giving reachability / transitive-closure contractions.
Being non-differentiable, this algebra raises rather than providing a
backward pass.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
